case_title: COBRA TRUCKING VS. ALPHA CONSTRUCTION ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF COBRA TRUCKING. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT ALPHA CONSTRUCTION. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT HIPOLITO ESPINOSA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COBRA TRUCKING AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA CONSTRUCTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY COBRA TRUCKING AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA CONSTRUCTION ESPINOSA, HIPOLITO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
